name: agent-console
description: VS Code companion extension for local coding agents: kickoff prompts, live activity, and an operator console.

agentConsole.role.description: Canonical role id for this VS Code window. If unset, Agent Console falls back to AGENT_CONSOLE_ROLE / PARTNER_PATH_ROLE or infers from roles.json userDataDir entries.

agentConsole.agentStateDir.description: Relative path from the repo root to the shared agent state directory.

agentConsole.rolesFile.description: Relative path from the repo root to the role manifest.

agentConsole.issueUrlTemplate.description: Optional issue-link template used by the console. Use {issue} as the placeholder, for example https://github.com/owner/repo/issues/{issue}.

scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test:extension && npm run test:contract
